features.name: 2D unpacked array with nested brace literal initialization
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array parameter with nested array literal initialization using the SystemVerilog '{'{' ...} syntax

features.name: type parameter with logic array used in array parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameter of type 'type' that defaults to a logic array, which is then used as the element type of another array parameter
features.snippet:
parameter type             ID_T            = logic[1:0];
parameter ID_T             STAGE_IDS[7:0];

features.name: 2D array passed to 1D array parameter causing elaboration mismatch
features.description: Code should include passing a 2D unpacked array to a module parameter expecting a 1D unpacked array, creating a dimensional mismatch
